title: CraftingCore
description: CraftingCore is a simple, server-side mod, that allows for crafting of a few, non-craftable items.
body:
**This mod has been deprecated, it will no longer recieve updates or regular maintenance.**

## CraftingCore is a simple, server-side mod, that allows for crafting of a few, non-craftable items.

### Items include:

- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Spawner
- Diamond, Iron, Gold, and Leather Horse Armor
- Trident
- Spawn Eggs


With more coming soon!

# Below is the wiki for all recipes:

## [Wiki](https://github.com/dogwhale65/CraftingCore)
